channel.title: CLI on A Little Ham Radio Site
channel.description: Recent content in CLI on A Little Ham Radio Site

item.title: Argh
item.description:
When last I posted, I was discussing the upcoming—and doubtless straightforward—process of getting this site actually online. The local copy worked, everything looked good, there existed documentation to move things from point A to point B, where point B is GitHub.

Suffice to say that this has been more of a learning experience than I hoped. I established that the Neocities CLI push option was good for nothing but generating errors and having issues with Ruby (and ruby -v and Homebrew have different ideas of which version is installed…) Third party Neocities options also weren’t working, and I’m not in a position to tell if it’s user error or something actually broken. So I went back to my maybe-just-do-GitHub-Pages plan.
